<!-- indicator: tbl-brfss-adult-fruit-veg -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: tbl-brfss-adult-fruit-veg
#| tbl-cap: 'Percentage of Adults Who Report Consuming Less Than One Fruit and Less Than One Vegetable Daily, 2016, 2018, and 2021'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_table_object
render_table_object(object_id="tbl-brfss-adult-fruit-veg", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)
```
